site.subscribe: Receive my CV in your e-mail

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.description1: Leading frontend development of scalable solutions using Vue.js, Angular and React. Integrating AI-assisted tools to optimize development workflows. Implementing microfrontends, code reviews, creating new features and tests. Working with PrimeNG, Figma, HTML5 and CSS3.
experience.description2: Engineered modern, high-performance interfaces using Angular, JavaScript, and PHP. Pioneered the implementation of microfrontends and established rigorous unit and functional testing standards, significantly improving code quality and user experience.
experience.description3: Architected and defined technical strategies for large-scale digital projects. Coordinated cross-functional teams across Colombia and India to deliver high-impact web and mobile applications for prestigious clients like Sancho BBDO.
experience.description4: Designed and implemented critical features for global clients, leveraging Laravel and Hubspot CMS. Successfully managed remote teams and drove the adoption of modern frontend practices to enhance project scalability.
experience.description5: Developed and maintained core features for the internal Hercules software. Represented the company in international tech events and utilized a diverse stack including ExtJS, Symfony, and Bootstrap to deliver reliable solutions.
